about.title: A different kind of aesthetics practice
about.body: Lumina Aesthetics was built on a simple idea: that aesthetic medicine should feel as good as it looks. We combine clinical precision with a calm, unhurried environment. No pressure, no overselling, no results that don't look like you.
bullets: Honest guidance before, during, and after treatment
